title: silene dioica f. lactea
intro: Silene dioica f. lactea, also known as White campion or White catchfly, is a rare and white-flowering variant of the Silene dioica plant, a member of the Caryophyllaceae family. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, particularly saponins and flavonoids. The health benefits of Silene dioica f. lactea include soothing and calming effects on the digestive system, as well as potential anti-anxiety and anti-depressant properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
